mapper.sql: a.id, a.account, a.accid, b.realness, a.status, a.deptid, c.fullname, a.createTime, a.modifyTime, a.version, b.video, b.address, b.lat, b.lng
a.id, a.account, a.accid, b.realness, a.status, a.deptid, a.createTime, a.modifyTime, a.version, b.video, b.address, b.lat, b.lng, f.phone
a.id, a.account, a.accid, b.realness, a.status, a.deptid, c.fullname, a.createTime, a.modifyTime, a.version, b.video, b.address, b.lat, b.lng, d.name
mapper.update: update biz_push_record set status = #{status},modifyTime = #{modifyTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select
from biz_push_record a inner join biz_accident b on a.accid = b.id inner join sys_dept c on a.deptid = c.id left join sys_user d on a.account = d.account and d.status != 3 where 1 = 1
and (a.createTime between CONCAT(#{beginTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{endTime},' 23:59:59'))
and a.account = #{account}
order by ${orderByField} ASC
order by ${orderByField} DESC
order by a.createtime DESC

select
from biz_push_record a inner join biz_accident b on a.accid = b.id inner join sys_dept c on a.deptid = c.id where 1 = 1
and (a.createTime between CONCAT(#{beginTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{endTime},' 23:59:59'))
and a.deptid = #{deptid}
order by ${orderByField} ASC
order by ${orderByField} DESC
order by a.createtime DESC

select
from biz_push_record a inner join biz_accident b on a.accid = b.id left join biz_wx_user f on b.openid = f.openid inner join sys_user c on c.account = a.account and c.status != 3 where 1 = 1 and a.account = #{account}
order by ${orderByField} ASC
order by ${orderByField} DESC
order by createtime DESC
